description_en: Total number of times you have prestiged.
description_fr: Nombre total de fois où vous avez effectué un prestige.
notes: Tracked in PlayerLifetimeStats.TotalPrestigesPerformed (Model/Game/PlayerLifetimeStats.cs) persisted to a dedicated stats file independent of the save game; lifetime cumulative

name_fr: Total des points de prestige gagnés
description_en: Total prestige points earned across all prestiges.
description_fr: Total des points de prestige gagnés à travers tous les prestiges.

description_en: Total divine points earned across all prestiges.
description_fr: Total des points divins gagnés à travers tous les prestiges.
column9: synced by delta from GodState.TotalGodPointsEarned; lifetime cumulative

name_en: Most Monsters Defeated in a Single Run
name_fr: Record de monstres tués en une seule partie
description_en: Highest number of monsters (bandits / dragons / trolls / ogres) defeated within a single run.
description_fr: Plus grand nombre de monstres (bandits / dragons / trolls / ogres) tués au cours d'une seule partie.
column9: computed as the max of BanditsDefeated+DragonsDefeated+TrollsDefeated+OgresDefeated seen in any single RunRecord; all-time record

name_en: Most Cities Founded in a Single Run
name_fr: Record de villes fondées en une seule partie
description_en: Highest number of cities founded within a single run.
description_fr: Plus grand nombre de villes fondées au cours d'une seule partie.
column9: computed as the max RunRecord.CitiesBuilt seen in any single run; all-time record
